initial_candidates.sql:
WITH team_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        l.id AS league_id,
        l.name AS league_name,
        t.id AS team_id,
        t.name AS team_name,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN (t.id = m.home_team_id AND m.home_goals > m.away_goals) 
                 OR (t.id = m.away_team_id AND m.away_goals > m.home_goals) 
            THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS total_wins
    FROM matches m
    JOIN teams t ON m.home_team_id = t.id OR m.away_team_id = t.id
    JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.id
    GROUP BY l.id, t.id, t.name
),
min_wins_per_league AS (
    SELECT 
        league_id,
        league_name,
        team_id,
        team_name,
        total_wins,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY league_id ORDER BY total_wins ASC, team_name ASC) AS rn
    FROM team_wins
)
SELECT 
    league_name,
    team_name
FROM min_wins_per_league
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH team_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        leagues.id AS league_id,
        teams.id AS team_id,
        teams.name AS team_name,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN (teams.id = matches.home_team_id AND matches.home_goals > matches.away_goals) 
                 OR (teams.id = matches.away_team_id AND matches.away_goals > matches.home_goals) 
            THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS total_wins
    FROM matches
    JOIN teams ON matches.home_team_id = teams.id OR matches.away_team_id = teams.id
    JOIN leagues ON teams.league_id = leagues.id
    GROUP BY leagues.id, teams.id, teams.name
),
min_wins_per_league AS (
    SELECT 
        league_id,
        MIN(total_wins) AS min_wins
    FROM team_wins
    GROUP BY league_id
)
SELECT 
    tw.team_name
FROM team_wins tw
JOIN min_wins_per_league mw ON tw.league_id = mw.league_id AND tw.total_wins = mw.min_wins
ORDER BY tw.league_id ASC, tw.team_name ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH team_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        l.id AS league_id,
        l.name AS league_name,
        t.id AS team_id,
        t.name AS team_name,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN (t.id = m.home_team_id AND m.home_goals > m.away_goals) 
                     OR (t.id = m.away_team_id AND m.away_goals > m.home_goals) 
                THEN 1 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) AS total_wins
    FROM matches m
    JOIN teams t ON m.home_team_id = t.id OR m.away_team_id = t.id
    JOIN leagues l ON t.league_id = l.id
    GROUP BY l.id, t.id, t.name
),
ranked_teams AS (
    SELECT 
        league_id,
        league_name,
        team_id,
        team_name,
        total_wins,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY league_id 
            ORDER BY total_wins ASC, team_name ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM team_wins
)
SELECT 
    league_name,
    team_name
FROM ranked_teams
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH team_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        leagues.id AS league_id,
        leagues.name AS league_name,
        teams.id AS team_id,
        teams.name AS team_name,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN (teams.id = matches.home_team_id AND matches.home_goals > matches.away_goals) 
                 OR (teams.id = matches.away_team_id AND matches.away_goals > matches.home_goals) 
            THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS total_wins
    FROM matches
    JOIN teams ON matches.home_team_id = teams.id OR matches.away_team_id = teams.id
    JOIN leagues ON teams.league_id = leagues.id
    GROUP BY leagues.id, teams.id, teams.name
),
min_wins_per_league AS (
    SELECT 
        league_id,
        MIN(total_wins) AS min_wins
    FROM team_wins
    GROUP BY league_id
)
SELECT 
    tw.team_name
FROM team_wins tw
JOIN min_wins_per_league mw ON tw.league_id = mw.league_id AND tw.total_wins = mw.min_wins
ORDER BY tw.league_id ASC, tw.team_name ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH team_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        leagues.id AS league_id,
        teams.id AS team_id,
        teams.name AS team_name,
        SUM(CASE 
            WHEN (teams.id = matches.home_team_id AND matches.home_goals > matches.away_goals) 
                 OR (teams.id = matches.away_team_id AND matches.away_goals > matches.home_goals) 
            THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS total_wins
    FROM matches
    JOIN teams ON matches.home_team_id = teams.id OR matches.away_team_id = teams.id
    JOIN leagues ON teams.league_id = leagues.id
    GROUP BY leagues.id, teams.id, teams.name
),
min_wins_per_league AS (
    SELECT 
        league_id,
        MIN(total_wins) AS min_wins
    FROM team_wins
    GROUP BY league_id
)
SELECT 
    tw.team_name
FROM team_wins tw
JOIN min_wins_per_league mw ON tw.league_id = mw.league_id AND tw.total_wins = mw.min_wins
ORDER BY tw.league_id ASC, tw.team_name ASC
LIMIT 1;
